message:
chore: include concurrent agent changes (formatting, encoding, plan rewrites)

Formatting and refactoring across multiple modules:
- decoding.rs: rustfmt adjustments for match arms and function calls
- distributed/encoding.rs: add RFC-grade doc and import pipeline types
- snapshot_restore.rs: formatting adjustments for error display and tests
- plan/analysis.rs: minor formatting cleanup
- plan/mod.rs: module organization adjustments
- plan/rewrite.rs: additional rule implementations and cleanup
- raptorq/decoder.rs: continued iteration refinements
- raptorq/linalg.rs: signature simplifications
- trace/mod.rs: export adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
